title: Department Manager Vacancy at Burger King India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Burger King India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Burger King India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Burger King India:
Burger King India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India!
